description:
In this repo with Dolt backend, bd v0.57.0 continues to fail doctor check 'Git Hooks Dolt Compatibility' even after multiple successful hook installs. Repro:
1) bd hooks install --beads --force (or --chain --force)
2) bd doctor
Observed: 'Installed hooks are outdated and incompatible with the Dolt backend.'
Additional context:
- 'Git Hooks' check passes with bd shims at v0.57.0
- hooks files include marker-managed blocks and bd-hooks-version: 0.57.0
- bd doctor --fix reports no automatic fix
- clean worktree indicates pending hook migration but apply mode is planning-only (bd migrate hooks requires --dry-run; #2218)
title: bd doctor false-positive on Git Hooks Dolt Compatibility
